487 O0100F1_VNTLTR_PRIOR_CD O0100F1_VNTLTR_PRIOR_CD O0100F1 Special Treatments/Programs: Ventilator Pre-admit Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident was on a ventilator or respirator within the last 14 days while not a resident of this facility. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes) discontinued 09/30/2023
488 O0100F2_VNTLTR_POST_CD O0100F2_VNTLTR_POST_CD O0100F2 Special Treatments/Programs: Ventilator Post-admit Code CHAR 1
